name: team-task-manager
description: Production-ready Team Task Manager assignment built with Next.js, Express, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
scripts.build:api: npm run db:generate && npm run build --workspace apps/api
scripts.start:api: npm run db:deploy && npm run start --workspace apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web
